---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae."
page-layout: article
---

## Gaurav Khanal

You can place a short academic CV here.

## Education

- MSc in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (DSAI), Université Côte d'Azur, France (2024-2026)

## Research interests

- Geometric Deep Learning
- Topological Deep Learning
- SciML / AI4Science
- Medical Image Registration and Analysis
- Biomedical Signal Processing

## Selected projects

- The Geometry of Probability
